chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2017 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7917/25 3.For hearing of main case 09-12-2025 Mr. Khuda Bux Jogi, Advocate for petitioners a/w petitioner No.1. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Naheed Akhtar, APG a/w SIP Hyder Raza Shar, I.O of the case. **** Mr. Muhammad Haneef Lashari, Advocate files Vakalatnama as well as statement on behalf of respondents No.5&6, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to other side. Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents No.2&4, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for petitioners. From the statements filed by the official respondents, it appears that the FIR in question, for which the instant petition has been filed seeking quashment, has now been finally challaned. The petitioners have an alternate remedy available under the law to approach the trial Court for seeking premature acquittal by filing an application under Section 265-K or 249-A, Cr.P.C, as the case may be. In view of above, this petition is dismissed along with listed application leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the trial Court for appropriate relief, if they desire so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
